Chronology (35 articles)
3303-04-07
Galactic News Alien Tsar Makes Statement
Admiral Aden Tanner has been appointed Chief of Federal Security to investigate mysterious spacecraft, confirming their activity in the Pleiades Nebula, Maia, and Merope systems.
3303-01-19
Community Goal Sirius Corp. to Address Unknown Artefact Issue
Sirius Corporation launches a research project to make starports more resistant to Unknown Artefact interference. The company appeals for unknown fragments, untypical shield scans, and aberrant shield pattern analysis.
